regional_cost_note: Insulation installers in Gisborne typically charge $22–$35/m² for ceiling insulation and $20–$30/m² for underfloor, installed. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Healthy Homes standards require minimum R-values — confirm your installer knows the current NZ Building Code requirements for your zone.
